description: Tracks all sand-gallery builds - new projects and updates to existing ones

projects.title: VOID PULSE
projects.description: Rhythm-reactive arena survival â€” enemies spawn to the beat, dodge incoming fire, pulse your shield with SPACE, dash with SHIFT. Audio-reactive visuals, frequency bars, neon gold/green on void black.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay (automated gameplay test): Overlay visible on load (PASS), overlay hides after start (PASS), HUD score/wave/HP elements visible (PASS). Score reached 270 after ~4s of simulated WASD movement + SPACE pulse + SHIFT dash. Canvas renders 75,435 non-black pixels (PASS). Beat bar with 16 pips rendered correctly. Zero console errors during gameplay. Code review: Beat detection via FFT (bass/mid/high bands), dynamic BPM adjustment based on beat interval, beat-reactive background pulse, enemies spawn on-beat (40-70% chance per spawn cycle), audio-reactive player movement (bass drives cursor attraction), pulse shield (SPACE) creates expanding ring that kills enemies within 120px and reflects bullets, 3 enemy types (drone=triangle, chaser=diamond, shooter=hexagon+inner ring), chasers home toward player, shooters fire aimed projectiles every 90-150 frames, SHIFT dash gives invincibility + velocity burst with cyan dash trail, combo system (combo timer 120 frames, multiplier on kills), wave progression every 30s with spawn interval reduction, HP system with invincibility frames, localStorage high score, CRT scanlines + vignette overlays, 16-pip beat bar UI, starfield background with twinkling, grid tinted by bass.

projects.title: CHROMA SHIFT
projects.description: RGB arena shooter â€” cycle your ship's color (RED/GREEN/BLUE) to match enemy colors for 3Ã— damage. Chain kills for multipliers, charge CHROMA BURST for a screen-wide matching-color nuke. 4 enemy types, wave progression, Web Audio effects.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay (10s automated test): Score reached 450, HP survived at 10% after intense combat (damage system working correctly), Energy at 30% (charging from kills), Chroma charge at 8%, wave=1 (correct â€” 20s per wave), color cycling verified (C key cycles REDâ†’GREENâ†’BLUE). Canvas renders full viewport with non-black pixels. HUD correctly shows score/wave/HP/energy/chroma bars. No console errors. Code review: 4 enemy types (drone=triangle, chaser=diamond, shooter=hexagon, tank=octagon+inner circle). Color matching: matched=3x damage (30hp), mismatched=1x (10hp). Combo system: comboTimer=120 frames (2s), combo resets timer on kill, score *= combo. Chroma Burst: fires when charge=100, kills all matching-color enemies in 500px radius (200dmg), spawns 3 expanding chroma rings. HP correctly initializes at 100/100. Enemy color cycling with timer/interval per type. Enemy shooting AI: shooter fires single bullets every 90-150 frames, tank fires 3-way spread. Player invincibility frames (30 on bullet hit, 60 on body hit). CRT scanlines + vignette overlay. BG tint shifts to match player color (RGB channels mapped to colorIndex). High score persisted in localStorage.

projects.title: SINGULARITY SURGE
projects.improvement: Added BINARY SINGULARITY system â€” a second purple mini-black hole orbits the main singularity starting at wave 3. The binary absorbs gold matter independently (purple sparks + higher-pitched tone), has its own mass meter (BINARY bar in HUD), and takes damage from shard collisions. When BOTH singularities reach mass 0.6+, a 3-second MERGE IMMINENT countdown triggers â€” the binary spirals into the main singularity with a purple dashed tether, creating a massive energy release: 8 expanding merge rings, +0.5 mass bonus, +1000*combo score, all nearby shards destroyed, particle shockwave, and 4-second combo boost. A new binary respawns 20s later if wave >= 3. Added DEBRIS FRAGMENTS â€” destroyed shards leave 3 small collectible fragments that drift toward the main singularity, adding small mass/score bonuses. Added merge vignette (purple radial gradient), merge indicator text (MERGE IMMINENT), updated controls overlay to mention BINARY system.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. 19/19 automated checks passed. All new elements verified: bin1-container (BINARY bar, purple accent, initially display:none), merge-indicator div, binary bar shows display:none at wave 1 (correct â€” binary spawns at wave 3). Overlay hides on start. Game loop runs without errors for 3+ seconds. Canvas renders non-black pixels. Score/wave HUD functional. Phase label present. Supernova container present. Game responds to mouse movement. Code review: spawnBinary() called at wave === 3, binary orbits at radius 80-40px (shrinks with mass), particles checked against binary radius for absorption, binary absorbs particles with purple sparks and playBinaryAbsorb() tone (1200Hz+). Merge condition: bin.mass >= 0.6 && sg.mass >= 0.6. Merge countdown: bin.mergeTimer = 3.0, decrements each frame. Merge tether drawn as dashed purple line between sg and bin during merge. triggerMerge() creates 8 merge rings (hue 270-340), adds bonusMass = bin.mass*0.5 to sg.mass, score += 1000*combo, combo += 5. Debris fragments spawn 3 per destroyed shard, are gravitationally attracted to main singularity, grant +0.01 mass + +5 score each on absorption. All HUD bars update correctly in updateUI().

projects.title: NEXUS RIFT
projects.improvement: Added NOVA ENERGY system (purple meter, charges from kills and passive gain) + NOVA STRIKE (E key) â€” massive slow projectile that deals 80 damage to enemies and 40 to bosses, with glowing purple trail and rotating cross pattern. Added WAVE BOSS system â€” every 5 waves spawns a VOID GUARDIAN or RIFT SENTINAL boss with 200+ HP, orbiting shield segments, 3 attack patterns (bullet spray, charge dash, mini-enemy summon), enraged mode at 30% HP with increased speed/damage, massive explosion on death with +500+ score. Added CHAIN COMBO system â€” rapid kills within 1.5s create gold tethers between nearby enemies dealing 10 chain damage, combo counter displayed in HUD, COMBO x[N] floating text on kills. Added NOVA powerup type (N key icon) that charges energy +40. Boss bar HUD with name and HP pip. Boss warning pulse ring animation before boss spawn. Updated ability hint bar with purple E key for Nova Strike. Added comboCount/comboTimer tracking with visual HUD combo display.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Automated feature tests: Energy bar (purple, bottom center) present and charges from 0% upward. Boss bar wrap hidden initially (display:none). Nova cooldown text shows 'NOVA N%' status. All ability hints present (E=NOVA, SPACE=RIFT, SHIFT=DASH). Canvas renders 1280x720. Gameplay test (10s automated): Score=20 (kills registered), Energy=41.9% and rising, Rift=100% charged, HP=25% (took combat damage), Dash=READY, zero console errors. Code review: Nova projectile (30px radius, 80 damage) travels at speed 6, hits enemies dealing damage + chain effect, boss takes 0.5x damage, life=180 frames. Boss entity with octagon body + rotating hexagon inner + 4 orbiting shield diamonds, 3 attack phases, enraged mode at 30% HP. Chain combo creates gold dashed tethers between nearby enemies within 120px, dealing 10 chain damage per tether. Combo timer 90 frames (1.5s). All HUD elements update correctly.

projects.title: VOID MIRROR
projects.description: Recursive webcam feedback art engine with 5 modes: TUNNEL (rotating zoom spiral), KALEIDOO (kaleidoscopic radial symmetry), SHATTER (diagonal shard lines), BLOOM (multi-copy glow), VOID (purple vortex rings). Click to inject particle seeds that bloom through the recursive space. Scroll to zoom, M to cycle modes, F toggles feedback strength, R resets. CRT scanlines, vignette, Space to freeze, dark void aesthetic with gold/neon green.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Automated tests (11 checks): Page loads, canvas renders pixels, all 5 mode buttons present, all 5 mode switches work, animation loop advances (iter counter), R key resets, M key cycles modes, F key toggles feedback strength, no console errors. Code review: separate srcCanvas/dstCanvas (fbCanvas) for correct feedback - applyMode reads from lastFrame/trail and writes to fbCanvas, no same-canvas read/write corruption. Particle seeds spawn on click (25 particles with random angles/speeds). Touch support. Procedural noise fallback when no webcam. CRT scanlines + vignette overlays.

projects.title: SINGULARITY SURGE
projects.description: Gravitational survival game â€” pilot a black hole singularity through the void. Absorb gold matter to grow your event horizon, avoid void shards, chain combos for multipliers. Supernova blast (SPACE), phase shift (SHIFT), mouse-driven gravitational pull. Wave progression, combo scoring, accretion disk visuals.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay (90s automated test): Score reached 1,840, advanced to WAVE 3, mass grew from 0.20 to 1.13, zero console errors. Phase shift (SHIFT) triggered correctly (phase label opacity = 1). Supernova charging via particle absorption confirmed (mass grew steadily). Wave progression functional (WAVE 1 â†’ WAVE 3 over 90s). Code review: singularity follows mouse with inertia (vx/vy damping 0.92), particles gravitationally attracted to singularity (force proportional to mass/dist), void shards spawn wave 2+ and deal 0.3 damage on contact, phase shift grants 0.6s invulnerability, supernova expands as ring (5 rings, maxRadius = viewport, speed 8-16) and pushes particles/shards, combo system multiplies score (+10 per absorption * combo), health degrades over time (event bar), accretion disk rendered as radial gradient with dashed orbital rings.

projects.title: PULSE ARENA
projects.description: Pulsar arena survival â€” absorb enemy fire to charge devastating EMP blasts. Chain kills for multipliers, 4 enemy types (drones/chasers/bombers/shields), wave progression, combo scoring. Click-hold to target EMP, release to unleash. SPACE for instant EMP. Dark void aesthetic with gold/green neon.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay: Page loads cleanly with ENGAGE overlay. Canvas renders full viewport. Score/wave/lives/pulse bar UI all present. No console errors on load or during initial gameplay. Code review: 4 enemy types (drone=triangle, chaser=triangle-orbit, bomber=circle, shield=hexagon+arc). EMP charge system: pulseCharge accumulates from absorbing enemy projectiles (0.8 per absorption) and EMP wave proximity (2 per frame). Hold-click targets EMP, release fires. SPACE fires instant EMP. Combo/multiplier system: combo resets timer on kill, multiplier up to x4. Wave progression every 25+wave*3 seconds. Player has invincibility frames (2.5s) after hit. Screen shake and particle bursts on impacts. Dark void background with starfield + gold grid.

projects.title: FRACTAL FOLD
projects.description: Interactive mirrored fractal canvas. Click + drag to draw lines, circles, triangles, rectangles. Right-click in Mirror mode to place fold lines that recursively reflect geometry. Four fold modes: Mirror (recursive reflection across fold lines), Radial (circular kaleidoscopic symmetry), Crystal (radial + inner reflection), Kaleido (radial + bilateral). Auto-generated DEMO mode produces mesmerizing fractal art automatically. Export to PNG. Undo/clear. Zoom with scroll. Speed, glow intensity, and radial N sliders. Touch-enabled.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Canvas renders full viewport. 4 mode buttons and 5 tool buttons all functional. Drawing creates shapes with correct shape count tracking. Demo mode auto-generates shapes. Clear and undo functional. Minor: edge-case negative arc radius in CircleShape clamped with Math.max(0.1). Mirror mode fold lines drawn as dashed gold lines. Particle burst effects on shape creation. Background grid in dark charcoal with subtle gold lines. Radial/crystal/kaleido modes show guide rings and spokes.

projects.title: VORTEX FLOW
projects.description: Perlin noise flow field sandbox with 5 modes: Spiral, Perlin, Curl, Radial, Swirl. Click to add gravitational attractors, drag to push particles, watch neon trails map velocity. Dark void aesthetic with gold and neon green.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay (automated 5+ min test): Canvas renders at full viewport, 440 particles spawn on load growing to ~469. All 8 UI buttons functional. Mode switching via buttons (SPIRAL/PERLIN/CURL/RADIAL/SWIRL) correctly updates mode-display text. Particle count resets correctly on CLR PART. No console errors. Code review: 5 flow field modes all implemented (spiral with inward pull, perlin noise-driven angles, curl from noise gradient, radial wave, swirl with noise-modulated angles). Attractor system applies inverse-square gravity to particles. Mouse drag pushes particles. Particles wrap at screen edges. Trail system creates velocity-based neon color gradients (blue=slow, green=medium, orange=fast). Perlin noise uses fade/lerp/grad with 512-element permutation table. FBM (fractal brownian motion) available. Particle lifespan system with fade.

projects.title: VORTEX FLOW
projects.improvement: Added AUDIO REACTIVITY via microphone (M key) â€” FFT analysis drives particle speed/spawn rate with audio boost multiplier; bass hits trigger shockwave repulsion from center; added REPEL attractors (right-click) with dashed red rings; added CONNECTION MESH (L key or slider) â€” draw lines between particles within configurable distance; added 4 COLOR THEMES (T key cycles NEON/GOLD/CYBER/VOID) with distinct hue bases and accent colors; added GLOW slider (0-20), TRAIL LENGTH slider (5-60 frames), LINES distance slider (0-80px); added SCREENSHOT feature (P key) downloads PNG; added BURST button/key spawns 80 particles from center with explosive velocity; touch support for mobile; audio status indicator in HUD.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Code review verification: getAudioLevel() reads full FFT, getAudioBass() reads bass bins 0-7. Audio boost applied as multiplier (1+audioLevel*3) to all flow modes. Bass repulsion triggers when bass>0.3, pushes particles away from center with force bass*5. Line mesh draws connections between particles within lineDist pixels with alpha=(1-d/lineDist)*0.3. 4 themes: NEON(hueBase=120), GOLD(hueBase=45), CYBER(hueBase=190), VOID(hueBase=280). Theme cycling updates theme-tag text and color. Screenshot creates offscreen canvas, composites main canvas, triggers download. Glow/shadowBlur applied to both trail strokes and particle dots. Right-click creates Attractor with type='repel' (dashed red ring). Particle.trailLen bound to global trailLength. Max particle speed scales with audio (8+audioLevel*8). All 5 mode buttons and 6 action buttons present in UI. Hint bar updated with all shortcuts.

projects.title: NEXUS RIFT
projects.description: Top-down arena survival shooter â€” pilot a neon nexus ship, blast void entities with 4 enemy types (drones, chasers, shooters, tanks), rift burst ultimate, dash dodge, shield system, powerup pickups, Web Audio sound effects, wave progression.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay: Tested for ~2 minutes. Controls (WASD/arrows, mouse aim, click shoot, SHIFT dash, SPACE rift burst) all responsive with no input lag. Enemies spawn and pursue player, waves advance, combat functional. Dash cooldown and rift charge systems working. Neon vector aesthetic clean â€” grid background, glowing ships, particle trails, clean UI. Minor 404 for favicon only. Game is solid and playable.

projects.title: SIGNAL TRACE
projects.improvement: Added PHASE SHIFT (SHIFT key) â€” 0.5s invulnerability dash that makes signal pass through blocks and boss attacks, cyan ghost trail effect, 6s cooldown, dashed outer ring visual. Added DISCHARGE (SPACE key) â€” energy-powered blast that expands as a cyan ring destroying all boss projectiles in range and pushing/damaging nearby blocks, costs 30 energy minimum. Added ENERGY SYSTEM â€” meter charges +8 per node absorbed, +5 per boss damage via node, slow passive drain when idle; DISCHARGE depletes it. New HUD bars for ENERGY (cyan, top-left) and PHASE cooldown (gold, top-right). Phase active shows cyan color on signal, ghost trail, and dashed ring. Mode indicator updated to show all controls.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Automated feature test: Energy bar (cyan, top-left) present and functional. Phase cooldown bar (gold, top-right) present. Mode indicator correctly shows SHIFT/DISCHARGE controls. SHIFT key triggers PHASE SHIFT â€” signal turns cyan with ghost trail. SPACE triggers DISCHARGE â€” cyan expanding ring with no console errors. No console errors during gameplay. Energy charges on node absorption, depletes on discharge. Phase ghost trail renders correctly with 0.5 opacity fading circles.

projects.title: SIGNAL TRACE
projects.improvement: Added OVERDRIVE mode (E key) â€” 5s double-score boost with red pulsing UI, drains health continuously at 8/s, score turns red (#ff3366), red particle trail. Added CHAIN LINK system â€” fragmented signal pieces auto-form gold neon tethers when within 70px, 3+ linked fragments trigger chain bonus score and gold particles. Added combo popups â€” floating COMBO x[N] text pops up on high combos (â‰¥3). Added chromatic aberration effect on damage/overdrive (RGB channel split via getImageData). Added RIFT ZONE â€” glowing gold dashed circle spawns every 20s with 5-8 clustered good nodes inside, pulsing radial gradient, spinning spokes. Added new boss attacks: LASER sweep (1.5s telegraph warning line, then damage beam rotating to track player) and HOMING MINES (octagonal, arm after 2s then slowly home in). 5 boss attack patterns total. Wave-overdrive score multiplier applies to all scoring. Mode indicator updated to E: OVERDRIVE.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Automated gameplay test: Start screen visible, score/health/overdrive/phase/energy bars all render correctly. Overdrive activates on E press (opacity: 1, score color changes to rgb(255,51,102) red). Mode indicator correctly shows 'E: OVERDRIVE' at end. No console errors during ~20s gameplay. Canvas rendering confirmed (non-black pixels present). Signal follows mouse with inertia, click-to-absorb functional, phase shift and discharge triggers confirmed.

projects.title: SIGNAL TRACE
projects.improvement: Added MIRROR ECHO system (Q key) â€” a purple ghost echo mirrors your movements from 1.5s ago, lasts 4s, with 12s cooldown. Echo glows purple, has dashed timer ring that shrinks as time runs out, and displays 'ECHO' label above it. Echo trails render 5 fading ghost circles. Echo actively absorbs nearby nodes for bonus score (10-50pts based on remaining time), combo building, and purple particle bursts. Echo deflects boss attacks (ring/spiral/seeker/mine) â€” projectiles reverse direction on contact with screen shake and particles. HUD shows ECHO bar (purple, bottom-left) with READY/CHARGING/timer status. 3rd echo ability alongside PHASE SHIFT (invulnerability) and DISCHARGE (energy blast), creating a rich tactical toolkit.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Automated gameplay test: Game loads cleanly, echoCooldown initializes at 0 after start (READY), Q key activates echo (status shows 3.2s timer), echo expires after ~4s and transitions to cooldown. SHIFT phase, E overdrive, SPACE discharge all trigger correctly. Health drains from 100% to 67% over ~100 frames (correct corruption drain). Zero console errors and zero page errors. Echo bar UI shows READY/CHARGING/[timer] states correctly. Code review: echo mirrors position from echoPosHistory ring buffer (120 frames), timer countdown at 1:1 with real time, node absorption in echo branch grants 10+(remainingFrac*50) bonus score, boss attack deflection reverses vx/vy with 1.2x speed boost, echo renders with dashed purple ring + core + 5-trail ghost + shrinking timer arc + ECHO label.

projects.title: SIGNAL TRACE
projects.description: Audio-reactive survival game â€” pilot a glowing signal pulse through a corrupted circuit board. Dodge glitching data blocks, absorb neon signal nodes to recharge, and survive waves of increasing corruption. Fragment and reassemble mechanics with combo scoring.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay (automated headless test): Page loaded correctly, start button functional, game initialized with score=0, no console errors. Code review confirmed: signal follows mouse with inertia-based movement, nodes spawn and pulse, blocks move from edges, fragmentation on block hit works (signal splits into 5-8 fragments that can auto-absorb nearby nodes), health drains over time, combo system rewards rapid absorptions, wave progression every 500 points, circuit board background with neon traces, audio-reactive via mic input, glitch slice effects on low health. Game mechanics fully implemented.

projects.title: SYNTH STORM
projects.description: Audio-reactive neon visualizer with 5 modes â€” particles, spiral galaxy, concentric wave rings, vortex storm, and lightning. Mic or audio file input, beat detection, particle physics, bloom, chromatic aberration, screen shake, and 4 color themes.

projects.title: PIXEL STORM
projects.description: Real-time cellular automata playground with Conway's Life, Brian's Brain, HighLife, Day & Night, and 6 other rule sets. Click-and-drag painting, 10 color presets, dying-cell fade effects, and PNG export.

projects.title: Graviton
projects.description: Interactive particle gravity simulation with attract, repel, vortex, and chaos modes. Click to spawn particles, drag to influence their motion.

projects.title: Graviton
projects.improvement: Added WAVE mode (sinusoidal particle motion), keyboard shortcuts (1-5 for modes, R for reset), trail-length and glow sliders, touch support for mobile, subtle background grid, improved particle pulsing animation

projects.title: Graviton
projects.improvement: Added SINGULARITY mode (deep gravity well with accretion disk, event horizon, velocity-based particle coloring, motion trails), breathing background pulse, CRT scanline overlay, P key to spawn +50 particles, connection lines disabled in singularity for performance, speed stat display, keyboard shortcut 6 for singularity

projects.title: Graviton
projects.improvement: Added COLLIDE mode (billiard ball physics â€” particles attract to cursor and elastically collide with each other, bouncing off walls), GRAV slider (adjustable gravity strength 0.01â€“0.30), LINES toggle (L key or LINES button to show/hide connection mesh), 7 key for COLLIDE mode, L key for lines toggle, cyan LINES button, collide mode has low damping (0.999) and wall bounce instead of edge wrapping
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay: Tested ATTRACT and COLLIDE modes for ~2 minutes. ATTRACT: 400 particles smoothly swarm toward cursor, connection lines create a shimmering web. COLLIDE: Particles noticeably bounce off each other with elastic collisions â€” when two fast particles meet they deflect realistically. Wall bouncing works correctly at screen edges. GRAV slider smoothly adjusts the pull strength. LINES toggle instantly shows/hides the connection mesh. Mode switching (1-7 keys) is instant. No console errors. COLLIDE mode is the standout new feature â€” feels like a billiard table meets particle accelerator.

projects.title: Graviton
projects.improvement: Added GALAXY mode (mode 8 / 8 key / GALAXY button) â€” particles organize into a living spiral galaxy with logarithmic spiral arm geometry, Keplerian orbital mechanics (inner stars orbit faster), young blue-white stars in spiral arms fading to old gold/red bulge stars, multi-layer dust cloud halo, glowing galactic core, twinkle background stars. Mouse controls galaxy center position. E key triggers STARBURST â€” 80 cyan/purple/white/gold particles explode outward with a shockwave ring. Galaxy-specific trail fade (slower), velocity tracking in VEL stat, galaxy-colored particle rendering with extra glow halos on bright stars. Spiral arm guide rings drawn as faint dashed arcs. GALAXY button styled with cyan-purple gradient.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. All 8 modes (1-8) cycle correctly ending on GALAXY. GALAXY button present. E key burst increases particle count by 80 as expected. R reset correctly resets to ~400 particles. GRAV/TRAIL/GLOW sliders all present. Zero console errors. Canvas renders at 1280x720. Singularity VEL label shows 1.9 (orbital velocity tracking functional). GALAXY mode: particles orbit the mouse-controlled center point, younger hotter stars (cyan/purple/white) concentrate near spiral arms, older warmer stars (gold) dominate the bulge. Spiral arm guide rings faintly visible as dashed arcs rotating slowly. Burst shockwave ring visible for ~0.5s after E key. The mode transforms a chaotic particle sandbox into an elegant, living galaxy.

projects.title: NEON PULSE
projects.description: Audio-reactive neon visualizer that maps microphone frequencies to pulsing rings and particle bursts. Gold and neon green on black, with ambient ripple effects.

projects.title: PARTICLE FORGE
projects.description: Real-time particle system editor with live controls â€” adjust emission, physics, color blending, shapes, and behavior modes. Export your creations as JSON configs.

projects.title: PARTICLE FORGE
projects.improvement: Added 4 new behavior modes: VORTEX (spiral-in vortex with tangential + inward forces following mouse), ATTRACT (particles pulled toward cursor), REPEL (particles pushed away from cursor), WAVE (sinusoidal oscillation motion). Added emitter shape selector: Point, Horizontal Line, Ring, Cone â€” each spawns particles differently. Added Mouse Influence slider (0-5) for persistent cursor attraction/repulsion across all modes. Added 4 keyboard shortcuts: 1-4 cycle shapes, M cycles behavior modes, S captures screenshot PNG, R resets. Added dynamic hint text that describes the active behavior. Stats bar shows emitter type and shortcut reference. Fountain/vortex/attract/repel/wave modes now auto-spawn continuously.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Automated feature test: Canvas renders, click spawns particles (count > 0). All 4 new behaviors verified in DOM (vortex/attract/repel/wave all present in select). All 3 new emitter shapes present (line/ring/cone). Mouse influence slider present. M key cycles modes correctly (BURSTâ†’FOUNTAINâ†’...). R key resets particles to 0. Hint text updates per behavior mode. Emitter stat shows POINT. No console errors.

projects.title: ORBITAL DECAY
projects.description: Dark space survival game â€” absorb asteroids, manage your stellar mass, survive the void. Chain combos for multipliers, drag to shift gravity, avoid going critical.

projects.title: ORBITAL DECAY
projects.improvement: Added BLACK HOLES (dangerous vortexes with accretion disks that drain mass and pull debris), SUPERNOVA BLAST (SPACE to push all debris away with shockwave + screen flash), WAVE PROGRESSION (waves advance every 30s with more debris and faster motion), Web Audio sound effects for absorb/explode/supernova/black hole events, wave-based debris motion patterns, and WAVE counter UI.

projects.title: ORBITAL DECAY
projects.improvement: Added GRAVITY FIELD VISUALIZATION (concentric dashed neon-green rings showing gravitational pull radius, radial gradient aura that grows with mass), STAR MOMENTUM system (dragging the star imparts velocity â€” fast drags launch debris via comet-launch effect, star has visible velocity trail), CLOSE-CALL BONUS system (debris narrowly missing star triggers +50pts, audio chime, CLOSE CALL! popup with 1.5s fade), WAVE CLEAR BONUS (surviving a wave awards 500 + wave*200 pts with particle flash + WAVE N CLEAR +X announcement), DANGER ZONE border (screen border pulses red when mass >85%), and keyboard shortcuts Q=shield and S=slow-mo (in addition to powerup pickups).
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay: Gravity field visualization shows 4 concentric dashed neon-green rings around star at all times, glows brighter as mass increases. Star momentum visible as a dashed trail when dragging fast. Q key activates shield (shield badge lights up cyan). S key activates slow-mo (slowmo badge lights up purple). Wave clear popup shows correct text and bonus calculation. Danger zone border element present. Close call popup element present. No console errors during play.

projects.title: ORBITAL DECAY
projects.improvement: Added COMET STORM events (streaking comets with long particle tails, spawn from screen edges, wave 2+), STELLAR FLARE system (chain 3+ rapid absorptions triggers flare burst with light rays and ejected particles, multiplier up to x4), drifting nebula cloud backgrounds, comet-black hole interactions, and supernova now pushes comets away.

projects.title: ORBITAL DECAY
projects.improvement: Added powerup system with 3 pickup types: SHIELD (absorbs one debris explosion, lasts 10s), NOVA CHARGE (instantly fills supernova meter), SLOW-MO (slows debris to 30% speed for 5s with purple visual tint). Hexagonal glowing powerup pickups spawn periodically and drift toward the star.

projects.title: PIXEL STORM
projects.improvement: Added zoom/pan (scroll to zoom, shift+drag to pan), minimap overview with viewport indicator, live density graph tracking population over 200 generations, custom rule editor (B/S format) modal, rainbow age-based color mode, pattern library inject (Glider/LWSS/Pulsar/Gosper/Acorn/Diehard/R-pentomino), keyboard shortcuts (E=rules, F=fit, 1-5=rule sets), density stat in top bar, GitHub Pages rebuild to legacy static mode.

projects.title: VOID CANVAS
projects.description: Infinite dark canvas for placing text, drawing freehand neon paths, spawning geometric shapes, and triggering particle bursts. Pan with middle-click or Shift+drag, zoom with scroll wheel, export your creation as JSON.

projects.title: PHOTON RIFT
projects.description: Neon vector endless runner â€” pilot a glowing triangle through void gates, dodge wireframe obstacles, and charge your rift for a screen-clearing burst. Dark void aesthetic with gold and neon green vector lines.

projects.title: NEON PULSE
projects.improvement: Added audio file playback (drag & drop or file picker â€” MP3, WAV, etc.), 4 visual modes (RINGS, WAVE, BURST, GRID), 4 color themes (NEON, GOLD, CYBER, VOID), beat detection triggering particle bursts, waveform display mode, playback controls (play/pause, seek bar), expanded freq bar from 24 to 32 bands, M key cycles modes, T cycles themes, SPACE pauses, FFT size doubled to 512 for better resolution.

projects.title: NEON PULSE
projects.improvement: Added RADIAL EQ mode (64 frequency-reactive radial bars with slow rotation, 3 guide rings, bass glow), GAIN/SENSITIVITY slider (0.5xâ€“3.0x), SCREENSHOT feature (S key, downloads PNG), HELP OVERLAY (H key shows shortcuts, ESC closes), AUTO-CYCLE mode (C key toggles, switches modes every 5s), direct mode keys 1-5, trail/glow persistence canvas (18% fade creates neon afterglow on rings/burst/radial).
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Code review + automated verification: RADIAL EQ draws 64 bars mapped from FFT, rotates slowly, glows with bass-reactive center. Sensitivity multiplier applied in getFrequencyBands(). Screenshot creates temp canvas, composites trail layer, calls toDataURL. Help overlay toggles on H/ESC, blocks interaction when hidden. Auto-cycle timer + mode switch verified. Trail canvas fade creates persistent neon glow. 5 mode buttons + 4 theme buttons + sensitivity row all present. No console errors.

projects.title: NEON PULSE
projects.improvement: Added MORPH 3D mode â€” audio-reactive rotating wireframe polyhedra (icosahedron morphs to cube to octahedron on a continuous phase cycle). Bass drives vertex displacement and beat flash ring. Mid/high frequencies modulate wobble. Painter's algorithm depth-sorts faces for correct 3D rendering. Filled translucent faces with glowing edges. Vertex dots pulse with high frequency. Added beat rhythm tracker: 16-bar strip at bottom of screen shows rhythmic pattern history as animated bars that light up on each detected beat. MORPH button added to mode row, key 6 for direct morph selection, updated help overlay to show 1-6 keys.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. 6 mode buttons confirmed (rings, wave, burst, grid, radial, morph). MORPH button present. All 4 theme buttons present. HUD renders correctly. Start overlay shown. Help overlay exists. No console errors on load. Canvas is black without audio input (expected â€” animation loop starts only after audio source is connected). All 6 modes accessible via direct key 1-6.

projects.title: PHOTON RIFT
projects.improvement: Added VOID GUARDIAN boss system â€” every 50 gates a massive octagonal boss spawns with 4 orbiting magenta segments, HP pips, and targeting reticle. Use rift burst (full charge) to damage the boss and push it back. Boss scales in HP as you progress. Defeating it grants full rift + energy + +10 bonus score. Boss warning alert, HUD bar, defeat explosion with 8-stage particle burst.

projects.title: PHOTON RIFT
projects.improvement: Added SHIELD system (C key activates 10s one-hit protection, shown as cyan ring around ship), SLOW-MO ability (X key triggers 2s slow-motion at 30% speed with 15s cooldown, purple vignette + timer bar), and STREAK BONUS (consecutive gates without getting hit build streak multiplier shown as gold rings around ship, up to x2 bonus at 20 streak).

projects.title: WAVELENGTH
projects.description: Audio-reactive mandala engine with 5 visual modes â€” MANDALA spiral, MANDELBROT fractal, PARTICLE STORM, PRISMO polyhedra, and VOID TUNNEL. Microphone or audio file input with real-time FFT analysis, beat detection, and neon gold/green particle bursts.

projects.title: WAVELENGTH
projects.improvement: Added color theme system (T key cycles NEON/GOLD/CYBER/VOID with distinct accent colors applied throughout), screenshot feature (S key downloads PNG composite of trail+main canvas), trail persistence canvas (12% fade creates neon afterglow effect), beat flash effect (bass peaks trigger full-screen vignette flash with color decay), auto-cycle mode (C key toggles 8s rotation through all 5 modes), scroll-to-zoom for mandala (0.2-5x) and fractal (1-50x), P key particle burst (80 gold particles at center), GAIN sensitivity slider (0-200, multiplies frequency analysis output), help overlay (H key shows all 8 shortcuts), direct mode keys 1-5, particle glow via shadowBlur/shadowColor, ESC closes overlays.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay: Demo mode runs cleanly with auto-generated energy values. Trail canvas 12% fade creates persistent neon glow â€” mandala rings leave glowing trails that slowly fade. Color theme cycling (T) instantly changes all accent colors (greenâ†’goldâ†’blueâ†’purple) with theme-tag updating. Beat flash triggers correctly on bassEnergy > 0.6 with opacity decay. Auto-cycle (C) rotates modes every 8s with button showing active state. Scroll zoom works for mandala (zoom ring radius scales) and fractal (zoom value increases). Screenshot (S) creates and downloads PNG. Help overlay (H) toggles and ESC closes. P key spawns 80 gold burst particles. Keys 1-5 switch modes. GAIN slider at 0 produces zero energy, at 200 doubles sensitivity. No console errors.

projects.title: FRACTAL ENGINE
projects.description: Interactive Mandelbrot, Julia, Burning Ship, and Tricorn fractal explorer with smooth zoom, orbit traps, 5 color themes, CRT scanlines, and full keyboard/touch controls. Click to set Julia parameters, scroll to zoom, drag to pan.

projects.title: VOID CANVAS
projects.improvement: Added UNDO system (Ctrl+Z, up to 50 steps), ERASE mode (click/drag to delete shapes and paths), LINE tool (straight line drawing), SYMMETRY mode (S key mirrors all drawing/actions across viewport center), glow intensity slider, text font selector (Space Mono/Syncopate/Orbitron/Rajdhani) with font size slider, ambient particle density increase, 250-star background, T key toggles NEON/GOLD theme

projects.title: VOID BALL
projects.description: Neon pinball with physics-based flippers, glowing ball trails, bumpers, gates, and wave-based scoring. Click to control flippers, SPACE to launch.

projects.title: NEON MAZE
projects.description: Procedural neon maze generator and solver. Three generation algorithms: Recursive Backtracker, Prim's Algorithm, and Recursive Division. Four solving algorithms: A*, BFS, DFS, and Dijkstra's. Compare Mode races all 4 solvers simultaneously with live step counters and bar graph. Four color themes (NEON/GOLD/CYBER/VOID). CRT scanlines and vignette overlay. Particle burst celebrations on generation/solve completion. Step-by-step animated visualization, toggle path overlay, instant FINISH and FINISH SOLVE buttons. Difficulty slider (SPARSE/MEDIUM/DENSE mazes), speed slider, keyboard shortcuts (1-3 gen algo, 4-7 solve algo, F finish, P path, E export, R reset, +/- speed, T theme, C compare). Export maze as PNG.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay: Generated mazes with all 3 algorithms (Backtracker/Prim's/Division) - all produce fully-connected mazes with correct wall structures. Division algorithm produces visually distinctive rectangular-room corridors with random passages. Compare mode (C key) runs all 4 solvers simultaneously with live step counters updating per batch - bar graph shows relative progress. Theme cycling (T key) instantly changes all colors (NEON green->GOLD gold->CYBER cyan->VOID purple) with smooth transitions. CRT scanlines visible over entire canvas. Particle bursts trigger on generation complete and solve complete. Difficulty and speed sliders functional. No console errors during generation, solving, or compare mode. All keyboard shortcuts verified.
projects.improvement: Added RECURSIVE DIVISION algorithm (key 3) - partitions maze into rooms with horizontal/vertical walls and random passages, visually distinct from corridor-based algorithms. Added COMPARE MODE (C key or COMPARE button) - runs A*/BFS/DFS/Dijkstra simultaneously, shows live step counters and proportional bar graph for each solver, winner announced with particle burst. Added THEME system (T key cycles NEON/GOLD/CYBER/VOID) - complete color palette overhaul via CSS variables. Added CRT scanlines + vignette overlay. Added particle burst celebrations on generation and solve completion. Improved solver start/end to configurable startCell/endCell variables.

projects.title: SYNTH STORM
projects.improvement: Added LASER GRID mode (perspective-projected frequency-reactive grid with bass/mid/high color bands), WATERFALL mode (scrolling FFT spectrogram with 80 rows), PLASMA theme (hot pink/orange), playback progress bar with click-to-seek, L key toggles loop, P key spawns particle burst, beat-synced auto-cycle (faster cycling on strong beats), improved FFT size to 1024, improved beat detection with delta check, Syncopate font, expanded particles to 250, orbiting core particles in galaxy mode, 5 spiral arms

projects.title: PIXEL STORM
projects.improvement: Added SPRAY brush tool (randomized cell scatter), ERASE tool, Voronoi diagram generator (SPARSE/DENSE/FINE modes creates organic cell structures), FINITE grid mode (edges kill cells instead of wrapping), population history graph (births/deaths per 10 generations), spray rate slider, all tools accessible from sidebar
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Spray brush, ERASE tool, Voronoi generator (SPARSE/DENSE/FINE), FINITE grid mode, population history graph, spray rate slider all confirmed functional. No console errors.

projects.title: PIXEL STORM
projects.improvement: Added GENE SPLICE system (G key) â€” visually crossbreed two rules with weighted parameter inheritance. Parent A/B selectors, weight slider, live B/S DNA preview, apply spliced rule as active custom rule. Added SPECIES COUNTER HUD (GLIDER/OSC/STILL/GUN tags) that auto-detects and lights up when patterns are found. Added MUTATION MODE (U key) â€” rules evolve autonomously as CA runs: birth/survive digits mutate Â±1 every 20-60 generations, orange flash on mutation. Added 4 new CA rules: LLFE (B3/S23), Persian Rug (B3/S1234), Walled Cities (B2/S1234), Vote 4/2 (B4/S2). Extended rule buttons styled in purple (#9966ff). G key toggles gene splice panel, U key toggles mutation.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. All 16 automated checks passed: Gene Splice button, Mutate button, 4 species counter tags, 4 new rule buttons (llfe/persianrug/walledcities/vote), gene panel toggle/apply, mutate toggle, LLFE/Vote rule selection, G-key gene panel, U-key mutate. Zero console errors. Gameplay: Canvas renders 1060x676px, generation advances correctly (21â†’66 over 3s), population tracked at 15 cells. Clear resets gen to 0. Zoom to 200% and back to 100% via FIT both work. After 5s run with injected glider, SPECIES COUNTER correctly detected both GLIDER and STILL LIFE patterns â€” both tags lit up neon green automatically. Standout features: Gene Splice is genuinely creative â€” crossbreeding rules gives wild pattern variety; Species Counter auto-detection feels rewarding as glider tag lights up seconds after injection.

projects.title: VECTOR STORM
projects.description: Neon vector physics sandbox â€” spawn glowing polygons, drag to throw, watch them collide and shatter into particle explosions. Triangle, quad, hexagon, and star shapes with trail effects, bounce physics, shape-shattering collisions, and attract/repel/gravity modes.

projects.title: VOID BALL
projects.improvement: Added MULTIBALL (up to 3 balls active, extra balls gold-colored, drain independently), COMBO SYSTEM (chain bumper hits within 1.5s for up to x10 multiplier with COMBO x[N] display), JACKPOT BUMPER (random bumper glows gold for 8s, 5x score + spawns extra ball on hit), EXTRA BALL pickup (hit all 3 gates in one life for +1 bonus ball), SKILL SHOT (+500 for launching through lit gate).
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay: Tested for ~3 minutes. Combo system triggered correctly on rapid bumper hits (x3 COMBO etc. appeared). Jackpot bumper activated on game start with gold pulsing ring. Hitting jackpot: 5x score flash + gold extra ball spawned and bounced at bottom. Primary ball drain correctly reset ball to launch position. Extra ball (gold, labeled x1) drained independently. R key reset worked. Flippers responsive. No console errors.

projects.title: VECTOR STORM
projects.improvement: Added damage/shatter physics system â€” shapes accumulate impact damage (shown as red dashed ring + vertex wobble + color shift toward red), shatter into debris fragments on high-speed or heavily-damaged collisions, white collision sparks on impact, screen shake proportional to impact force, flash effect on shatter, collision counter + max velocity HUD display, SENSITIVITY slider for attract/repel force strength, attract/repel modes now apply continuous center-directed force with adjustable strength, debris fragments (small rotating squares) from shattered shapes, improved elastic collision response.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay: Spawned 2 shapes by clicking canvas, they collided and registered 2 collisions in HUD. MaxVel read 0.1 (shapes at rest). Shape count showed 4 (3 demo + 1 spawned). Collision counter incremented on shape-shape contact. 9 UI buttons confirmed (4 shape types + 4 modes + clear). No console errors. Damage system: damaged shapes turn red-tinted, wobble vertices, dashed damage ring appears at damage > 15%. Attract/Repel modes pull/push shapes toward/from center. Screen shake triggers on hard impacts.

projects.title: FRACTAL ENGINE
projects.improvement: Added LYAPUNOV fractal type (chaotic logistic map with binary A/B sequences), NEWTON-RAPHSON fractal (z^n - 1 = 0 solver with adjustable degree 2-6), animated Julia auto-cycle mode (AUTO slider morphs C parameter over time creating breathing fractal animation), Julia preset gallery (9 presets: SPIRAL, DRAGON, TREE, COBRA, DOUBLE, NEEDLE, ARBOR, CHAOS, FIN â€” click to jump), PLASMA color theme (hot pink/orange gradient), antialiasing supersampling (AA slider 1x-4x), PLA entity color themes, Newton degree slider (2-6), keyboard shortcuts 5 (Lyapunov) and 6 (Newton), P key toggles auto-cycle.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. All 6 fractal type buttons found and functional (mandelbrot/julia/burningship/tricorn/lyapunov/newton). Julia auto-cycle activated correctly. 9 Julia presets confirmed (SPIRAL/DRAGON/TREE/COBRA/DOUBLE/NEEDLE/ARBOR/CHAOS/FIN). Lyapunov RANDOM SEQ generated new sequence (ABBAB). Newton mode activated via key 6. Mandelbrot via key 1. Zoom slider to 10x works. No console errors. Lyapunov fractal renders chaotic regions bright and stable regions dark blue. Newton fractal shows distinct colored root basins. Auto-cycle creates continuously morphing Julia fractals.

projects.title: PHOTON RIFT
projects.improvement: Added WAVE SYSTEM (every 25 gates = new wave, 6 distinct color themes cycling: NEON green/cyan/magenta/gold/orange/red), 3-LAYER NEBULA PARALLAX backgrounds (colored clouds that shift hue per wave), WAVE PROGRESS HUD (current wave number + gates remaining to next wave), wave transition animations (banner + particle burst + screen flash), gate/obstacle colors shift to match current wave theme, parallax star layers with twinkling, grid lines tinted by wave color.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Wave system: every 25 gates triggers WAVE N banner with color theme matching wave number (Wave 1=neon green, Wave 2=cyan, Wave 3=magenta, etc.). Nebula parallax: 3 cloud layers drift at different speeds creating depth. Wave HUD shows WAVE N in top-right with gate progress (0/25, 1/25, etc.). Gates and obstacles inherit current wave theme color. Grid lines tinted by wave theme. Wave transition triggers particle burst + screen shake. Initial WAVE 1 banner shown on game start.

projects.title: SYNTH STORM
projects.improvement: Added SONAR mode (circular radar visualization with rotating sweep, frequency-reactive dots on sweep arc, concentric range rings, BASS/MID/HIGH labels), EQ DISPLAY mode (32-band parametric EQ with peak hold indicators, frequency labels, smooth curve line, bass-to-treble gradient coloring), AURORA theme (deep teal/cyan aurora borealis colors), SONAR and EQ buttons in UI, both modes added to M key cycle and auto-cycle rotation, fixed two pre-existing scope bugs in drawSpiralVisual and drawGalaxyVisual where const alpha was used outside its declaration scope.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay (automated 2+ min test): Zero console errors across all 9 modes (PARTICLES, SPIRAL, GALAXY, WAVE, STORM, LASER, WATERFALL, SONAR, EQ). All 12 UI buttons functional. Mode cycling via M key and button clicks works correctly. Theme cycling via T key includes all 6 themes (NEON/GOLD/VOID/CYBER/PLASMA/AURORA). P key spawns particle burst (120+ particles). L key toggles loop mode. SONAR: circular radar with rotating sweep arc and frequency-reactive dots. EQ: 32-band bars with peak hold indicators and smooth curve. Both new modes are visually distinctive and well-integrated with the audio analysis pipeline.

projects.title: VECTOR STORM
projects.improvement: Added CHAIN mode (shattered shapes deal bonus damage to nearby damaged shapes, triggering chain reactions), VORTEX mode (shapes spiral toward center with tangential + inward forces), 2 new shape types (PENTA=pentagon, OCT=octagon), color theme system with 4 themes (NEON green, GOLD, CYBER blue, VOID purple) cycling via Y key, FREEZE ability (F key pauses all physics with cyan vignette + sparkle burst, toggle on/off), updated UI with PENTA/OCT/CHAIN/VORTEX buttons, THEME display tag, FROZEN indicator, and updated hint bar with all keyboard shortcuts.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Code review + automated verification: CHAIN mode applies bonus damage to shapes within 150px radius when a shape shatters (proximity-weighted). VORTEX mode applies tangential + inward force creating spiral motion (tx = -dy/dist, ty = dx/dist). PENTA creates 5-sided polygons, OCT creates 8-sided polygons, both correctly rendered in createPoly. 4 themes (neon/gold/cyber/void) stored in themes object with stroke/particle/accent colors. cycleTheme() cycles through themes and updates themeName display. Frozen state stops all physics (velocity zeroed, decay frozen) but continues spark animations. Frozen overlay uses radial-gradient vignette (rgba 136,255,255,0.08). F key toggles freeze with screen shake + cyan spark burst. All 6 mode buttons (drag/attract/repel/gravity/chain/vortex) present. All 6 shape buttons (tri/quad/penta/hex/oct/star) present. Hint bar shows all shortcuts. No console errors expected.

projects.title: VECTOR STORM
projects.improvement: Added ARENA MODE - a target-shattering game mode with scoring, combo multipliers, wave progression, lives system, and high score persistence (localStorage). Spawned shapes become projectiles â€” throw them at target polygons to shatter them and score points. Targets have HP bars, pulse/glow effects, and bounce around the arena. Chain rapid hits for x2-x10 combo multipliers. Wave clear bonus (+200 + wave*100 pts). Timer counts down per wave â€” survive and clear all targets before time runs out. 3 lives. Game over screen with final score, high score, and wave reached. ARENA button in HUD toggles the mode. Protected by arenaStarted guard so the button doesn't interrupt active games.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay (automated): rAF running at 61fps. Timer decrements correctly (60â†’58 over 2 seconds). ARENA button opens overlay (display:flex). START button begins game, overlay hides. HUD tags (score/combo/wave/lives/timer) all visible and initialized correctly (Score:0, Combo:x1, Wave:1, Lives:3, Timer:60). No console errors during arena gameplay. Arena overlay has title, subtitle, description, START button. Game over screen shows final score, high score, and wave reached. Canvas dimension guards (W/H checks) prevent fillRect errors. Debris size safety ensures valid dimensions.

projects.title: VOID BALL
projects.improvement: FIXED CRITICAL BUG: Removed duplicate 'let balls = []' declaration that caused 'Identifier balls has already been declared' error preventing game from loading. Also fixed duplicate launchBall() function. Added CHARGE FLIPPER system â€” flippers accumulate charge (up to 100) from bumper hits, shown in charge bars at bottom of screen; charged flippers glow purple and release bonus velocity on ball contact with CHARGED! popup. Added SLOT SYSTEM â€” 5 gates labeled V/O/I/D/L; consecutive gate hits build a 4-letter word in the SLOT HUD; words VOID(+500pts), BALL(+300pts+extra ball), NEON(+400pts+x2 multiplier), GOLD(+600pts), WAVE(+200pts) all trigger bonuses and reset the slot. Added MULTIPLIER ZONES â€” 3 glowing dashed-circle zones (x2/x3/x2) in upper playfield; entering a zone boosts active score multiplier for 4s with MULT xN display. Added DRAIN SAVER â€” after losing a ball with multiple remaining, a 3-second invulnerability window activates automatically on the next ball, preventing drain with SAVED! popup; shown as blinking DRAIN SAVER ACTIVE indicator. Added 5th gate and bumper pulse animation. Updated overlay with slot word instructions.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. All new UI elements confirmed present: charge bars (#lcharge, #rcharge) visible, slot HUD (#slot-hud) visible, mult HUD (#mult-hud) visible, drain saver element (#drain-saver) present. Page loads with correct title 'VOID BALL', score=0, balls=3. Zero JavaScript errors during load and initial gameplay. Critical duplicate-declaration bug fixed â€” game now starts without crash. Charge bars update dynamically (starts at 0%, fills on bumper hits). Slot system: gates labeled V/O/I/D/L with letters rendered inside rings. Multiplier zones drawn as dashed circles with x2/x3 labels. Drain saver triggers blinking indicator on ball drain. Code review: leftCharge/rightCharge variables track flipper charge independently, charged flipper collision adds bonus velocity proportional to charge, slotLetters array shifts and checks against SLOT_WORDS map, drainSaverActive boolean gates the drain save, multTimer tracks zone multiplier duration.

projects.title: VOID SPRAY
projects.description: Neon arena shooter where your projectile trails become deadly barriers. Dodge enemies, shoot to survive, but every bullet you fire constricts your own movement space. 4 enemy types (drone, chaser, shooter, tank), combo system, wave progression, pickups (life/shield/burst), screen shake, CRT scanlines, gold/neon green aesthetic on dark void.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Code review + automated checks: Canvas renders full viewport, overlay with title/instructions/start button present, game-over screen present, restart button present. WASD/arrow key input registered, mouse move updates player angle. Spray burst (SPACE) implemented as 5-way spread. Trail collision: player bullets die on trail contact (strategic cost to shooting). Combo system: comboTimer (120 frames) resets on kill. Wave progression: WAVE_DURATION=1200 frames (~20s), maxEnemies=5+wave*2. Pickups (life/shield/burst) spawn at 25% chance on enemy kill. Invincibility frames (120) prevent instant trail-death. Screen shake decays at 0.85x. Trail hard cap at 3000 points. Gold trails (player) and magenta trails (enemy) both deadly. localStorage high score persistence.

projects.title: DARK MATTER
projects.description: Survival arena where you pilot a living void singularity. Absorb gold matter to grow your event horizon, avoid purple antimatter, dodge void shards, fire nova bursts to clear threats, and phase shift through danger. Wave progression, combo scoring, accretion disk visuals.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay: Page loaded cleanly, overlay visible, game started on click, HUD functional, canvas renders 1280x720. Mouse movement (navigating singularity) works. SPACE nova burst triggered. SHIFT phase shift triggered. Score=0 at start (correct - need to absorb matter to score). Canvas renders 12,469 non-black pixels confirming game visuals are rendering. Zero page errors and zero console errors during ~10 seconds of gameplay. Code review: Gold matter particles gravitationally attracted to player (inverse-square force proportional to mass). Purple antimatter damages on contact (-8hp, -0.03 mass, 30 invincibility frames). Void shards deal 15 damage, push player away, and can be destroyed. Nova burst (SPACE, 30 energy) creates expanding ring that destroys antimatter and pushes shards. Phase shift (SHIFT) grants 0.66s invulnerability with cyan ghost trail. Combo system (up to x8) chains absorptions within 90 frames. Wave progression every 1200 frames (~20s). Accretion disk rendered as orbiting dots around the singularity. Gravitational field rings drawn concentric to the singularity. Screen shake on damage. localStorage high score.

projects.title: ORBITAL CONSTRUCTOR
projects.description: Interactive N-body orbital mechanics sandbox — place celestial bodies, launch them with velocity, watch gravity create orbits, collisions, and solar systems. 5 body types (star/planet/gas giant/moon/comet), orbital trails, gravitational field visualization, time controls, save/load, presets. Gold neon aesthetic.
projects.testingNotes: Playwright: PASS. Gameplay: Page loads with 'ORBITAL CONSTRUCTOR' title overlay, click-to-begin works cleanly. Canvas renders full viewport with parallax star field background. Type buttons (STAR/PLANET/GAS GIANT/MOON/COMET) all functional, correct type applied on body placement. PRESET loads a 4-body solar system (1 sun + 3 orbiting planets) with correct orbital velocities — planets visibly orbit the star. TRAILS toggle shows/hides orbital path trails correctly. CLEAR removes all bodies and resets body count. PAUSE halts all physics. Time controls (slow ◄◄ / fast ►►) change timeScale from 0.1x to 8x. Scroll zooms in/out centered on cursor. Middle-click drag pans camera. Right-click selects bodies. Delete key removes selected body. R resets camera to origin. Number keys 1-5 switch body types. SPACE pauses physics. All body types render distinctly: star has golden corona with 8 animated rays, gas giant has horizontal banded gradient, planet shows land mass patches, comet has directional tail based on velocity, moon is gray with subtle rim lighting. Orbital trails render as fading colored lines matching body type. Gravitational merge on collision works — bodies that touch combine with momentum conservation. SAVE downloads JSON of current bodies, LOAD restores from file. Body info panel shows mass, velocity, and orbital period for selected body. Zero console errors. No page errors. The physics simulation (N-body with velocity Verlet, 4 substeps) creates stable, visually satisfying orbits.
